title: Can't make make_tracing_sc unless VERILATOR_ROOT is set to git install directory
body:
in copy of make_tracing_sc example:
```
> make clean
rm -rf obj_dir logs *.log *.dmp *.vpd coverage.dat core
> export VERILATOR_ROOT=/usr/local
> make

-- Verilator tracing example

-- VERILATE ----------------
/usr/local/bin/verilator -sc --exe -x-assign fast -Wall --trace --assert --coverage -f input.vc top.v sc_main.cpp
%Error: Cannot find verilated_std.sv containing built-in std:: definitions:/usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv
        ... Looked in:
             /usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv
             /usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv.v
             /usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv.sv
             /usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv.vh
             /usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv.svh
             obj_dir//usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv
             obj_dir//usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv.v
             obj_dir//usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv.sv
             obj_dir//usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv.vh
             obj_dir//usr/local/include/verilated_std.sv.svh
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)
make: *** [Makefile:73: run] Error 1
```
If I set VERILATOR_ROOT to verilator git install directory, then example runs fine
```
> make clean
rm -rf obj_dir logs *.log *.dmp *.vpd coverage.dat core
> export VERILATOR_ROOT=/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator
> make

-- Verilator tracing example

-- VERILATE ----------------
/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/bin/verilator -sc --exe -x-assign fast -Wall --trace --assert --coverage -f input.vc top.v sc_main.cpp

-- COMPILE -----------------
make -j -C obj_dir -f ../Makefile_obj
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator_wrk/examples/make_tracing_sc/obj_dir'
ccache g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=1 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow       -I/usr/local/include  -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1 -Wno-deprecated -Os -fstrict-aliasing -c -o sc_main.o ../sc_main.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=1 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow       -I/usr/local/include  -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1 -Wno-deprecated -c -o verilated.o /home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=1 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow       -I/usr/local/include  -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1 -Wno-deprecated -c -o verilated_cov.o /home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/verilated_cov.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=1 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow       -I/usr/local/include  -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1 -Wno-deprecated -c -o verilated_vcd_c.o /home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.cpp
ccache g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=1 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow       -I/usr/local/include  -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1 -Wno-deprecated -c -o verilated_threads.o /home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/verilated_threads.cpp
/usr/bin/python3 /home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/bin/verilator_includer -DVL_INCLUDE_OPT=include Vtop.cpp Vtop___024root__DepSet_h84412442__0.cpp Vtop___024root__DepSet_heccd7ead__0.cpp Vtop__Trace__0.cpp Vtop___024root__Slow.cpp Vtop___024root__DepSet_h84412442__0__Slow.cpp Vtop___024root__DepSet_heccd7ead__0__Slow.cpp Vtop__Syms.cpp Vtop__Trace__0__Slow.cpp > Vtop__ALL.cpp
echo "" > Vtop__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
ccache g++ -Os -fstrict-aliasing  -I.  -MMD -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include -I/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=1 -DVM_SC=1 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow       -I/usr/local/include  -MMD -MP -DVL_DEBUG=1 -Wno-deprecated -c -o Vtop__ALL.o Vtop__ALL.cpp
Archive ar -rcs Vtop__ALL.a Vtop__ALL.o
g++      -L/usr/local/lib-linux64 sc_main.o verilated.o verilated_cov.o verilated_vcd_c.o verilated_threads.o Vtop__ALL.a    -pthread -lpthread -latomic  -lsystemc -o Vtop
rm Vtop__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator_wrk/examples/make_tracing_sc/obj_dir'

-- RUN ---------------------
obj_dir/Vtop +trace

        SystemC 2.3.4-Accellera --- Jul 24 2023 14:38:10
        Copyright (c) 1996-2022 by all Contributors,
        ALL RIGHTS RESERVED
[0] Model running...

Enabling waves into logs/vlt_dump.vcd...
[43000] fastclk is 5 times faster than clk

*-* All Finished *-*
- sub.v:46: Verilog $finish

-- COVERAGE ----------------
/home/Dropbox/programming/Verilog/verilator/bin/verilator_coverage --annotate logs/annotated logs/coverage.dat
Total coverage (5/34) 14.00%
See lines with '%00' in logs/annotated

-- DONE --------------------
To see waveforms, open vlt_dump.vcd in a waveform viewer

> 
```
